workflow: RupeeKit Workflow 9 Scheduler - Daily Final Social Posting Pack

facebook.copy: It's a common misconception: many believe their Cost-to-Company (CTC) is the amount they'll actually receive. But the reality of your 'in-hand' salary is often quite different! From Provident Fund (PF) to professional tax and income tax, various deductions play a significant role in shaping your monthly take-home pay. Understanding these differences is key for smart financial planning. Don't get surprised on payday. Use RupeeKit's Salary In-Hand Calculator to get an educational estimate of your actual earnings and compare the impact of different deductions. Plan better for your financial future. Find it here: https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/salary-in-hand-calculator-india
manualInstructions: Create a RupeeKit Facebook Page post.
Attach the Facebook final PNG image.
Paste the copy and hashtags.
Use the calculator URL once.
Do not boost or buy traffic during test phase.

instagram.caption: Myth: Your CTC is your take-home pay. Fact: Deductions matter more than you think! 🤯 Many of us equate our CTC with what we'll actually receive, but that's a common mistake. Your in-hand salary is what hits your bank account after essential deductions like PF, professional tax, and income tax. Knowing this difference is crucial for budgeting and financial planning. Get a clear educational estimate of your monthly take-home pay with RupeeKit's Salary In-Hand Calculator. Understand your numbers and plan confidently. Ready to compare your inputs? Visit: https://www.rupeekit.co.in/tools/salary-in-hand-calculator-india
manualInstructions: Create an Instagram image post under the RupeeKit brand.
Upload the Instagram final PNG image for a normal single-image post.
For carousel creation, use the Instagram carousel logo base slide generated by 8D-G2.
Do not upload the raw logo separately to Gemini/Nano Banana.
Tell Gemini/Nano Banana to keep the top-right RupeeKit logo unchanged.
Paste the caption and hashtags.
Use website link in bio or plain caption text where allowed.
Do not use personal identity or personal profile.
